prestazioni: Engine: 4.0L V8 twin-turbo (MA1.71/MA1.72) with a custom Shorai LFX36L3-BS12 lithium-ion battery to reduce weight by 10kg, paired with a Cobb Accessport V3 for a Stage 2+ tune targeting 650whp (stock turbo limit) via E85 blend (90% ethanol) and upgraded fuel system with Bosch 044 fuel pumps and Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors

Turbocharger upgrade: Hybrid Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA billet wheel turbochargers with 62mm compressor wheels and 66mm turbine wheels, custom 3.5" V-band downpipes (Fabspeed Motorsport), and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 24psi peak boost on 93 octane (28psi on E85)

Suspension: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 8-position rebound and 12-position compression damping, adjustable top mounts, and helper springs for a 40mm drop, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars, and Porsche Motorsport 955 Cup-spec spherical bearing control arms (955.347.901.00)
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (P-ATB001) with carbon fiber fenders, custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the mirror caps and rear diffuser, and a Vorsteiner V-FF 107 front lip spoiler with integrated LED DRLs

Wheels: HRE FF01 22x11 ET45 front and 22x12 ET50 rear in Satin Black with custom center caps featuring the Porsche crest in red, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30/22 front, 325/25/22 rear) with TPMS sensors from Schrader Electronics

Interior: Recaro Pole Position bucket seats (991.207.015.00) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, Alcantara-wrapped MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with red stitching, and a custom roll cage (MCS Motorsport 9-point bolt-in) painted in Porsche GT3 RS Green (29E)
